method OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition <Clone>$()
method OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public bool Equals(OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition? other)
method OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public virtual bool Equals(object? obj)
method OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public virtual int GetHashCode()
method OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public virtual string ToString()
method OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public void Deconstruct(out string Id, out string Title, out string Body, out System.Action<OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelClosedEvent>? Closed)
property OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public System.Action<OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelClosedEvent>? Closed { get; init; }
property OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public string Body { get; init; }
property OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public string Id { get; init; }
property OFS.Sdk.GameplayPanelDefinition :: public string Title { get; init; }

type public enum OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor : int
field OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor :: BottomLeft = OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor.BottomLeft (2)
field OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor :: BottomRight = OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor.BottomRight (3)
field OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor :: TopLeft = OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor.TopLeft (0)
field OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor :: TopRight = OFS.Sdk.GameplayUiAnchor.TopRight (1)

property OFS.Sdk.IModNetworkRpc<TRequest, TResponse> :: public abstract string Id { get; }
property OFS.Sdk.IModNetworkRpc<TRequest, TResponse> :: public abstract string OwnerId { get; }
property OFS.Sdk.IModNetworkRpc<TRequest, TResponse> :: public abstract string QualifiedId { get; }

method OFS.Sdk.IModPhysicsApi :: public abstract OFS.Sdk.IModSphereCollider AddSphereCollider(OFS.Sdk.UnityObject gameObject, OFS.Sdk.ModSphereColliderDefinition? definition = null)

method OFS.Sdk.IModPhysicsApi :: public abstract void SyncTransforms()

property OFS.Sdk.InteractionEvent :: public OFS.Sdk.UnityObject GameObject { get; init; }
property OFS.Sdk.InteractionEvent :: public OFS.Sdk.UnityObject Interactable { get; init; }

type public enum OFS.Sdk.InteractionHandling : int
field OFS.Sdk.InteractionHandling :: AfterOriginal = OFS.Sdk.InteractionHandling.AfterOriginal (2)

field OFS.Sdk.InteractionHandling :: ReplaceOriginal = OFS.Sdk.InteractionHandling.ReplaceOriginal (0)

DefaultTimeout = null, System.Func<OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkRpcRequest<TRequest>, OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkRpcAuthorizationResult>? Authorize = null, OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkRpcRateLimit? RateLimit = null)

RequestSerializer, out OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkSerializer<TResponse?>? ResponseSerializer, out int MaxRequestBytes, out int MaxResponseBytes, out System.TimeSpan? DefaultTimeout, out System.Func<OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkRpcRequest<TRequest?>, OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkRpcAuthorizationResult>? Authorize, out OFS.Sdk.ModNetworkRpcRateLimit? RateLimit)
